allow: PowerShell($prod = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://portfolio-website-sigma-silk-57.vercel.app" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "PROD alias contains Fun Zone: " + \($prod -match 'Fun Zone'\); "PROD alias contains Elarfaoui \(one word\): " + \($prod -match 'Abderrahman Elarfaoui'\))

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://portfolio-website-sigma-silk-57.vercel.app" -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Cache-Control"="no-cache"}\).Content; "Three.js loaded: " + \($html -match 'three.min.js'\); "Has 3D canvas: " + \($html -match 'bg-canvas'\); "New email: " + \($html -match 'a.elarfaoui@aui.ma'\); "LinkedIn: " + \($html -match 'ar-elarfaoui'\); $p1 = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://portfolio-website-sigma-silk-57.vercel.app/projects/project-one.html" -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; "Project One page status: " + $p1)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; $exp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://portfolio-website-sigma-silk-57.vercel.app/experience.html" -UseBasicParsing; "experience.html status: " + $exp.StatusCode + " | has marquee: " + \($exp.Content -match 'marquee'\) + " | premium font: " + \($exp.Content -match 'style.css'\); $idx = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://portfolio-website-sigma-silk-57.vercel.app/" -UseBasicParsing; "index special button: " + \($idx.Content -match 'Immersive Experience'\))
